name: Ragil Immanuvel
title: Data Analyst | Business Intelligence Professional | Business Analyst | AI Solutions Builder
summary: A results-driven data professional with 2 years of experience at Neuberg Diagnostics, transforming complex healthcare and business data into actionable intelligence. Ragil bridges the gap between raw data and business decisions — building dashboards executives actually use, automating processes that used to take hours, and developing AI solutions that change how organizations operate. He does not just analyze data; he designs systems that make data work for the business.
contact_response: You can reach Ragil via email at ragilimmanuvel@gmail.com or connect with him on LinkedIn at https://www.linkedin.com/in/ragil-immanuvel-p-d-a88533200/. You can also download his resume directly from his portfolio.
